introSection: Jack Rabbit was a kiddie roller coaster located at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a track design similar to that of multiple different kiddie-coaster manufacturers, making the true manufacturer hard to pin down.

fullText:
Jack Rabbit was a kiddie roller coaster located at LeSourdsville Lake Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA.

The ride has a track design similar to that of multiple different kiddie-coaster manufacturers, making the true manufacturer hard to pin down.
